Class BuWizz3ProtocolConstants

java.lang.Object
ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
public final class BuWizz3ProtocolConstants extends Object
Constants for the BuWizz 3.0 BLE protocol (API version 3.22).

BuWizz 3.0 uses Nordic nRF52833 as the main MCU and a co-processor ("Tajnik") for motor outputs, LEDs, and UART on ports 1–4. After connection it requests a PHY switch to BLE 5 Coded (long-range) mode.

All 128-bit UUIDs are stored in standard UUID string format.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    APPLICATION_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID
    Application characteristic (short UUID 0x2901) — Write + Notify.
    static final String
    APPLICATION_SERVICE_UUID
    Application Service UUID (128-bit).
    static final double
    BATTERY_VOLTAGE_BASE
    Battery voltage base (volts).
    static final double
    BATTERY_VOLTAGE_STEP
    Battery voltage step per ADC unit (volts).
    static final String
    BOOTLOADER_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID
    Bootloader characteristic (short UUID 0x8000) — Write + Notify.
    static final int
    CMD_ACTIVATE_SHELF_MODE
    Command byte: Activate Shelf Mode (battery disconnect).
    static final int
    CMD_CHECK_CHARGER_SETTINGS
    Command byte: Check Charger Settings.
    static final int
    CMD_ENABLE_PID_REPORTING
    Command byte: Enable PID Controller State Reporting.
    static final int
    CMD_READ_ACCEL_CALIBRATION
    Command byte: Read Accelerometer Calibration Data.
    static final int
    CMD_SET_ACCEL_CALIBRATION
    Command byte: Set Accelerometer Calibration Data.
    static final int
    CMD_SET_ACCEL_LPF
    Command byte: Set Accelerometer Low-Pass Filter.
    static final int
    CMD_SET_CURRENT_LIMITS
    Command byte: Set Current Limits.

    CMD_SET_DATA_PERIOD
    Command byte: Set Data Transfer Period.
    static final int
    CMD_SET_DEVICE_NAME
    Command byte: Set Device Name.
    static final int
    CMD_SET_LED_STATUS
    Command byte: Set LED Status.
    static final int
    CMD_SET_MOTION_WAKE
    Command byte: Enable / Disable Motion Wake-Up.
    static final int
    CMD_SET_MOTOR_DATA
    Command byte: Set Motor Data (simple 6-channel PWM).
    static final int
    CMD_SET_MOTOR_DATA_EXTENDED
    Command byte: Set Motor Data (extended, PU-aware, 4 PU ports + 2 PWM).
    static final int
    CMD_SET_MOTOR_RAMP
    Command byte: Set Motor Ramp-Up / Ramp-Down Rates.
    static final int
    CMD_SET_MOTOR_TIMEOUT
    Command byte: Set Motor Timeout Configuration.
    static final int
    CMD_SET_PU_PORT_FUNCTION
    Command byte: Set PU Port Function.
    static final int
    CMD_SET_SERVO_PID
    Command byte: Set Servo PID Parameters.
    static final int
    CMD_SET_SERVO_REFERENCE
    Command byte: Set Servo Reference Input.
    static final int
    CMD_SET_WATCHDOG
    Command byte: Activate Connection Watchdog.
    static final int
    CMD_STATUS_REPORT
    Command byte for the Device Status Report notification.
    static final int
    CMD_UART_BAUD_RATE
    Command byte: UART Baud Rate Setup.
    static final int
    CMD_UART_BAUD_RATE_SET
    Sub-command for CMD_UART_BAUD_RATE: set baud rate.
    static final String
    DEVICE_NAME
    Default advertised BLE device name (user-customisable via command 0x20).
    static final int
    MANUFACTURER_DATA_LENGTH
    Manufacturer data length in bytes.
    static final int
    MAX_BOOTLOADER_PACKET_SIZE
    Maximum packet size in bytes for bootloader commands.
    static final int
    MAX_PACKET_SIZE
    Maximum packet size in bytes for application commands.
    static final double
    MOTOR_CURRENT_SCALE
    Motor current scale factor (amperes per ADC unit).
    static final int
    MOTOR_SPEED_FULL_FORWARD
    Motor speed: full forward (127).
    static final int
    MOTOR_SPEED_FULL_REVERSE
    Motor speed: full reverse (−127).
    static final int
    MOTOR_SPEED_STOP
    Motor speed: stop.
    static final double
    PID_SAMPLE_PERIOD_S
    PID controller sample period in seconds (1.0 / PID_SAMPLE_RATE_HZ).
    static final int
    PID_SAMPLE_RATE_HZ
    PID controller sample rate in Hz.
    static final int
    PU_FUNCTION_GENERIC_PWM
    PU port function: Generic PWM.
    static final int
    PU_FUNCTION_PU_ABS_POSITION_SERVO
    PU port function: PU absolute position servo.
    static final int
    PU_FUNCTION_PU_POSITION_SERVO
    PU port function: PU position servo.
    static final int
    PU_FUNCTION_PU_SIMPLE_PWM
    PU port function: PU simple PWM (default).
    static final int
    PU_FUNCTION_PU_SPEED_SERVO
    PU port function: PU speed servo.
    static final int
    STATUS_BATTERY_LEVEL_MASK
    Status byte mask for battery level (bits 4–3).
    static final int
    STATUS_BATTERY_LEVEL_SHIFT
    Status byte bit shift for battery level.
    static final int
    STATUS_BLE_LONG_RANGE_BIT
    Status byte bit: BLE long-range PHY active (bit 2).
    static final int
    STATUS_CHARGING_BIT
    Status byte bit: charging (bit 5).
    static final int
    STATUS_ERROR_BIT
    Status byte bit: error flag (bit 0).
    static final int
    STATUS_MOTION_WAKE_BIT
    Status byte bit: motion wake-up enabled (bit 1).
    static final int
    STATUS_USB_CONNECTED_BIT
    Status byte bit: USB connected (bit 6).
    static final String
    UART_CH1_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID
    UART channel 1 characteristic (short UUID 0x3901) — Write + Notify.
    static final String
    UART_CH2_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID
    UART channel 2 characteristic (short UUID 0x3902) — Write + Notify.

    UART channel 3 characteristic (short UUID 0x3903) — Write + Notify.
    static final String
    UART_CH4_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID
    UART channel 4 characteristic (short UUID 0x3904) — Write + Notify.

  • Field Details

    • DEVICE_NAME

      public static final String DEVICE_NAME
      Default advertised BLE device name (user-customisable via command 0x20).

      Manufacturer data length in bytes.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • APPLICATION_SERVICE_UUID

      public static final String APPLICATION_SERVICE_UUID
      Application Service UUID (128-bit).

      Raw bytes MSB-first: 93:6E:67:B1:19:99:B3:88:81:44:FB:74:D1:92:05:50

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • APPLICATION_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID

      public static final String APPLICATION_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID
      Application characteristic (short UUID 0x2901) — Write + Notify. All application commands are written here; status notifications arrive here.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • BOOTLOADER_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID

      public static final String BOOTLOADER_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID
      Bootloader characteristic (short UUID 0x8000) — Write + Notify. Used for OTA firmware update.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • UART_CH1_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID

      public static final String UART_CH1_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID
      UART channel 1 characteristic (short UUID 0x3901) — Write + Notify. Raw UART pass-through for port 1.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • UART_CH2_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID

      public static final String UART_CH2_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID
      UART channel 2 characteristic (short UUID 0x3902) — Write + Notify. Raw UART pass-through for port 2.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      public static final String UART_CH3_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID
      UART channel 3 characteristic (short UUID 0x3903) — Write + Notify. Raw UART pass-through for port 3.
      See Also:

      Status byte bit: error flag (bit 0).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • BATTERY_VOLTAGE_BASE

      public static final double BATTERY_VOLTAGE_BASE
      Battery voltage base (volts). Formula: V = BATTERY_VOLTAGE_BASE + rawByte * BATTERY_VOLTAGE_STEP
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • BATTERY_VOLTAGE_STEP

      public static final double BATTERY_VOLTAGE_STEP
      Battery voltage step per ADC unit (volts).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MOTOR_CURRENT_SCALE

      public static final double MOTOR_CURRENT_SCALE
      Motor current scale factor (amperes per ADC unit).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_SET_DEVICE_NAME

      public static final int CMD_SET_DEVICE_NAME
      Command byte: Set Device Name. Format: [0x20][name: up to 12 ASCII bytes, NUL-terminated if shorter].
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_SET_MOTION_WAKE

      public static final int CMD_SET_MOTION_WAKE
      Command byte: Enable / Disable Motion Wake-Up. Format: [0x21][enable][idleTimeoutSecs: 4 bytes][shallowSleepTimeout: 4 bytes].
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_SET_ACCEL_CALIBRATION

      public static final int CMD_SET_ACCEL_CALIBRATION
      Command byte: Set Accelerometer Calibration Data. Format: [0x22][24 bytes of 6 × IEEE 754 float calibration factors].
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_READ_ACCEL_CALIBRATION

      public static final int CMD_READ_ACCEL_CALIBRATION
      Command byte: Read Accelerometer Calibration Data. Send byte only; response: [0x23][24 bytes].
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_SET_MOTOR_DATA

      public static final int CMD_SET_MOTOR_DATA
      Command byte: Set Motor Data (simple 6-channel PWM). Format: [0x30][spd1..spd6: 6 signed bytes][brakeFlags][lutDisable]. Speed encoding: 0x81 (−127) = full reverse, 0x00 = stop, 0x7F (127) = full forward.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_SET_MOTOR_DATA_EXTENDED

      public static final int CMD_SET_MOTOR_DATA_EXTENDED
      Command byte: Set Motor Data (extended, PU-aware, 4 PU ports + 2 PWM). Format: [0x31][ref1..ref4: 4 × 4 signed bytes][spd5][spd6][brakeFlags][lutDisable].
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_SET_DATA_PERIOD

      public static final int CMD_SET_DATA_PERIOD
      Command byte: Set Data Transfer Period. Format: [0x32][periodMs: unsigned 8-bit, 20–255 in steps of 5 ms].
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_SET_MOTOR_RAMP

      public static final int CMD_SET_MOTOR_RAMP
      Command byte: Set Motor Ramp-Up / Ramp-Down Rates. Format: [0x33][rampUp1..rampUp6][rampDown1..rampDown6]. Each byte is % per 128 ms; 0 = disabled.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_SET_MOTOR_TIMEOUT

      public static final int CMD_SET_MOTOR_TIMEOUT
      Command byte: Set Motor Timeout Configuration. Format: [0x34][config]. 0 = stop + brake, 1 = stop + coast, 2–254 = coast to stop in (N−1) seconds.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_SET_WATCHDOG

      public static final int CMD_SET_WATCHDOG
      Command byte: Activate Connection Watchdog. Format: [0x35][timeoutSecs: unsigned 8-bit]. 0 = disable. Resets on each call.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_SET_LED_STATUS

      public static final int CMD_SET_LED_STATUS
      Command byte: Set LED Status. Format: [0x36][r1][g1][b1]...[r4][g4][b4] + optional blinking config for 4 LEDs. Send byte alone to revert to default (solid white).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_SET_ACCEL_LPF

      public static final int CMD_SET_ACCEL_LPF
      Command byte: Set Accelerometer Low-Pass Filter. Format: [0x37][lpfSetting: unsigned 8-bit]. Default at startup: 2.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_SET_CURRENT_LIMITS

      public static final int CMD_SET_CURRENT_LIMITS
      Command byte: Set Current Limits. Format: [0x38][limit1..limit6: 6 unsigned bytes]. Step = 30 mA. Defaults: 1.5 A (ports 1–4), 3.0 A (ports 5–6).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_UART_BAUD_RATE

      public static final int CMD_UART_BAUD_RATE
      Command byte: UART Baud Rate Setup. Format: [0x40][0x10][channelId: 1–4][baudRate: 4 bytes little-endian].
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_UART_BAUD_RATE_SET

      public static final int CMD_UART_BAUD_RATE_SET
      Sub-command for CMD_UART_BAUD_RATE: set baud rate.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_SET_PU_PORT_FUNCTION

      public static final int CMD_SET_PU_PORT_FUNCTION
      Command byte: Set PU Port Function. Format: [0x50][func1..func4: one byte per port].
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_ENABLE_PID_REPORTING

      public static final int CMD_ENABLE_PID_REPORTING
      Command byte: Enable PID Controller State Reporting. Format: [0x51][portIndex: 1–4 enable, 0 disable].
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_SET_SERVO_REFERENCE

      public static final int CMD_SET_SERVO_REFERENCE
      Command byte: Set Servo Reference Input. Format: [0x52][ref1..ref4: 4 × 4 signed bytes].
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_SET_SERVO_PID

      public static final int CMD_SET_SERVO_PID
      Command byte: Set Servo PID Parameters. Format: [0x53][portIndex][36 bytes of float/int8 PID params].
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_ACTIVATE_SHELF_MODE

      public static final int CMD_ACTIVATE_SHELF_MODE
      Command byte: Activate Shelf Mode (battery disconnect). Format: single byte 0xA1.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_CHECK_CHARGER_SETTINGS

      public static final int CMD_CHECK_CHARGER_SETTINGS
      Command byte: Check Charger Settings. Send byte only; response: [0xAC][1 byte settings].
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      PU port function: Generic PWM.
      See Also:

      PU port function: PU simple PWM (default).
      See Also:

      PU port function: PU speed servo.

      PU port function: PU position servo.
      See Also:

      public static final int PU_FUNCTION_PU_ABS_POSITION_SERVO
      PU port function: PU absolute position servo.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      public static final int MOTOR_SPEED_FULL_REVERSE
      Motor speed: full reverse (−127).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MOTOR_SPEED_STOP

      public static final int MOTOR_SPEED_STOP
      Motor speed: stop.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      public static final int MOTOR_SPEED_FULL_FORWARD
      Motor speed: full forward (127).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      public static final int PID_SAMPLE_RATE_HZ
      PID controller sample rate in Hz.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      public static final double PID_SAMPLE_PERIOD_S
      PID controller sample period in seconds (1.0 / PID_SAMPLE_RATE_HZ).
      See Also:
